title: rubus gratiosus var. inflexus
intro: Rubus gratiosus var. inflexus, commonly known as the flexile bramble or flexible dewberry, is a type of plant that belongs to the rose family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus gratiosus var. inflexus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin issues, and digestive problems.
